allowed_claim: ContextGate-Bench detects strong, weak, and localized synthetic neighbor-context signal.
blocked_claim: Synthetic signal recovery proves real biological neighbor-context utility or unlocks biological Bio-HCA.

allowed_claim: ContextGate rejects or abstains on null, missing-panel, and FOV/sample-confounded synthetic controls.
blocked_claim: Null-control specificity proves absence of biology in all public spatial TME datasets.

allowed_claim: CP-Q3 is evaluator sensitivity/specificity evidence only.
blocked_claim: CP-Q3 positive controls are real ligand-receptor biology, clinical evidence, or model-discovery evidence.
